title: The Worst Generation Faces the Emperors
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #13, King as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WORORORO!! It's such a shame to have to kill you all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it can't be helped!! Once you're dead we'll take everything you have!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Frur "Friends":!! Your "Treasure" ... All of it will be ours!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You guys have "pomeglyphs" too, don't you!? I can't wait to get my hands on them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The victor of this battle will take a massive step...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One piece will be on break next week.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 8 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
